svg.title: Tony Memory Lifecycle — Hot to Cold to Graph
svg.desc: Complete memory lifecycle from live message through session, consolidation, vector storage, and graph enrichment
svg.text: if session exceeds 20 msgs: older turns written to PostgreSQL, Redis keeps only latest 20
Tier 3 — cold (forever · dual store: vector + graph)

g.text: Full session JSON · forever · tony-session-archive bucket

svg.text: Retrieval path — what happens on every request
all retrieval steps run in parallel via asyncio.gather — total target under 40ms
